description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build sakura that runs on push and pull request events for master, feature/*, and release/* branches, excluding certain files. The workflow should have a single job called build that runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for Debug and Release configurations across Win32 and x64 platforms. The job should check out the code, set up MSBuild, build the solution, install Locale Emulator, build HTML Help, and create an installer with Inno Setup. Finally, it should upload various artifacts to GitHub if the configuration is Release.
